name: Improper Neutralization of Macro Symbols
description: The product does not properly neutralize macro-related symbols in user input before passing it to a downstream component that interprets macros, allowing attackers to inject executable macro commands (e.g., in spreadsheets, document templates, or preprocessors).
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user-controlled data containing macro trigger characters (=, $, %, {{}}) that flows to EXTERNAL[macro_interpreter] or STORAGE[macro_enabled_doc] without a TRANSFORM[macro_escape] that strips or escapes macro-significant symbols
